login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: You will be redirected to your identity provider to authenticate securely.
login.securityHint: Secured via your organisation's identity provider

errors.generic: Something went wrong during sign-in. Please try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please try signing in again.
errors.interrupted: Authentication session was interrupted. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
forgotPassword.helpText: An email will be sent with a reset link valid for 1 hour.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account is associated with this address, you will receive a reset link shortly. Check your spam folder.

resetPassword.title: New password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a secure password for your account.
resetPassword.expiredMessage: This reset link is no longer valid or has expired.
resetPassword.expiredAlert: The reset link expired after 1 hour. Please request a new one.

signup.title: Create your Givernance workspace
signup.subtitle: No credit card. Your workspace is ready in under five minutes.
signup.securityHint: We only use your email to verify your workspace.
signup.emailHasTenant: Your organisation may already be on Givernance. Contact your administrator to be invited.

workspace.title: Your workspace
workspace.description: Define your organisation name and public workspace URL.

contact.title: Your details
contact.description: Enter the contact information for the first administrator.

security.title: Validation and compliance
security.description: Confirm the terms before creating the workspace.

signup.consent: I accept the <terms>terms of service</terms> and the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.

errors.emailInUse: This email is already associated with a Givernance account.
errors.slugSyntax: Use lowercase letters, numbers and dashes.
errors.slugReserved: This URL is reserved — choose another.
errors.slugPunycode: International domain names are not supported yet.
errors.consentRequired: You must accept the terms to continue.
errors.captchaInvalid: Security check failed. Please try again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again later.
errors.generic: Signup could not be completed. If you believe this is an error, please contact support.

signupSuccess.title: Check your inbox
signupSuccess.subtitle: We've sent a verification link to <email></email>. Click the link to finish creating your workspace.
signupSuccess.subtitleNoEmail: We've sent you a verification link. Click it to finish creating your workspace.
signupSuccess.resendSent: We've resent the email. Give it a minute.
signupSuccess.resendTooMany: You've requested too many emails. Please wait a bit before trying again.
signupSuccess.spamHint: If you don't see it within a few minutes, check your spam folder.

signupVerify.title: Finish signing up
signupVerify.subtitle: Confirm your name and choose a password so you can sign in to your workspace.

fields.passwordHint: At least {min} characters. You'll use this on the next screen to sign in.

errors.expired: This verification link is invalid or has already been used.
errors.namesRequired: Please provide your first and last name.
errors.passwordTooShort: Use a password of at least {min} characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: We couldn't finish verifying your workspace. Please retry.

resend.label: Get a new verification link
resend.sent: If the email matches an account, we've sent a fresh verification link. Please check your inbox.

inviteAccept.title: Accept your invitation
inviteAccept.subtitle: Confirm your name and choose a password to join the workspace.

fields.passwordHint: At least {min} characters. You'll use this to sign in on the next screen.

localeHint.matchesTenantDefault: Using the workspace's default language. Change it any time from your profile.
localeHint.personalOverride: Saving this as your personal preference for this workspace.

errors.expired: This invitation link is invalid or has already been used. Ask the person who invited you to send a new one.
errors.namesRequired: Please provide your first and last name.
errors.passwordTooShort: Use a password of at least {min} characters.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
errors.generic: We couldn't accept this invitation. Please retry or ask the inviter to resend.

sessionCheck.title: Sign out to accept this invitation
sessionCheck.body: Accepting an invitation creates a new sign-in for the invited email. Sign out first so the next sign-in lands on the right account.

selectOrganization.title: Which workspace would you like to enter?
selectOrganization.subtitle: Your account belongs to multiple organisations.

workspace.title: Workspace selection
workspace.description: Choose which organisation to open for this session.

errors.forbidden: You cannot switch to this workspace.
errors.generic: Could not switch workspaces. Please try again.

notFound.label: Error 404
notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved. Don't worry, we'll get you back on the right path.
notFound.persistsMessage: If the problem persists, contact our <link>support</link>.

server.title: An unexpected error
server.description: Something went wrong on our end. Our team has been notified and is working to resolve the issue.
server.dashboardLink: You can also go back to the <link>dashboard</link>.

provisionalAdmin.body: You are the provisional administrator of this workspace until {date}. Any other verified member can dispute.

list.title: Provisional-admin disputes
list.subtitle: Triage queue for workspaces whose first admin is being disputed.

resolutions.replaced: The disputer replaced the provisional admin.
resolutions.escalated_to_support: Escalated to support for manual triage.

kept.label: Keep the provisional admin
kept.hint: The original admin keeps `org_admin`; provisional window closes.

replaced.label: Replace with the disputer
replaced.hint: Disputer becomes `org_admin`; former admin demoted to `user`.

escalated_to_support.label: Escalate to support
escalated_to_support.hint: Leaves the workspace as-is; support will follow up manually.

errors.generic: Could not apply the resolution. Please retry.

list.title: Tenant management
list.subtitle: Inspect every enterprise tenant and drill into lifecycle state, domains, users, and recent audit events.

empty.title: No tenants found
empty.description: Tenant records created through the super-admin onboarding flow will appear here.

new.title: New enterprise tenant
new.subtitle: Provisions the tenant row and its Keycloak Organization. IdP and first-admin invite land after.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Core facts used across the back-office and the tenant's login URL.

firstAdmin.title: First admin (optional)
firstAdmin.description: Send the invite link in one step. You can also do this later from the tenant page.

fields.name: Organisation name
fields.nameHint: The legal entity name shown throughout the app.
fields.slugHint: Lowercase letters, numbers and dashes; 2–50 characters; cannot be a reserved platform slug.
fields.slugAutoGenerated: Auto-generated from the organisation name. Type to customise.
fields.firstAdminEmailHint: If filled, an invitation is sent immediately after the tenant is created.
fields.firstAdminLocaleHint: The welcome email goes out in this language. The first admin can change it before accepting.

errors.slugSyntax: Slug must be lowercase alphanumeric with internal dashes only.
errors.slugReserved: This slug is reserved — choose another.
errors.slugPunycode: International domain prefixes (xn--) are not supported yet.
errors.upstream: Could not reach Keycloak to provision the Organization. Please retry.
errors.generic: Could not create the tenant. Please retry.
errors.inviteFailed: Tenant created, but the first-admin invitation failed. Retry from the tenant page.

nextSteps.title: After creation
nextSteps.step1: Claim a domain and share the DNS TXT value with the NPO's IT team.
nextSteps.step2: Provision the OIDC or SAML identity provider once DNS is verified.
nextSteps.step3: Invite the first admin — they complete onboarding via Keycloak.

domains.empty: No managed domains are attached to this tenant yet.

users.empty: No tenant users have been provisioned yet.

audit.empty: No recent audit events are available for this tenant.

lifecycle.title: Lifecycle actions
lifecycle.description: Suspend, archive, or reactivate the tenant from the super-admin back office.
lifecycle.reasonPlaceholder: Optional note recorded alongside the lifecycle transition.
lifecycle.error: Unable to update tenant lifecycle. Please retry.

empty.description: Send the first-admin invite to seed this tenant. They'll set their password and complete onboarding from the link.

pending.resendHint: We don't keep the previous invite link. Click Resend to issue a fresh one — the original link stays valid for the recipient until then.

expired.description: The invitation for {email} expired on {date}. Resend to mint a fresh link.

cancelDialog.title: Cancel first-admin invitation?
cancelDialog.description: Cancel the invitation for {email}? The link will stop working immediately and the recipient will not be able to accept it.

copyLink.label: Invite link
copyLink.hint: Send this link to the new admin via your usual channel.

errors.conflict: This invitation has already been accepted.
errors.copyFailed: Couldn't copy the link to your clipboard.
errors.formInviteFailed: Tenant created, but the first-admin invitation failed. Send it again below.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage organisation-level defaults and export tools.

members.title: Members
members.subtitleEmpty: Invite teammates to join your workspace.
members.subtitleWithCount: {count, plural, one {# invitation on file} other {# invitations on file}}

empty.title: No invitations yet
empty.description: Invite a teammate to give them access to this workspace.

invite.title: Invite a teammate
invite.description: They'll receive an email with a link to join your workspace and choose their password.

fields.localeHint: The welcome email will be sent in this language. The invitee can change it before accepting.

roleHints.org_admin: Full access — can invite others, manage settings, and access all data.
roleHints.user: Can read and update operational data (constituents, donations, campaigns).

errors.generic: Couldn't send the invitation. Please try again.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke invitation
revokeDialog.description: Revoke the invitation for {email}? The link will stop working immediately.
revokeDialog.descriptionFallback: Revoke this invitation? The link will stop working immediately.

errors.resendGeneric: Couldn't resend the invitation. Please try again.
errors.revokeGeneric: Couldn't revoke the invitation. Please try again.

funds.title: Funds
funds.subtitleEmpty: Create restricted and unrestricted funds that can be attached to campaigns and donations.
funds.subtitleWithCount: {count, plural, one {# fund configured} other {# funds configured}}
funds.readOnly: Only organisation admins can create funds.

empty.title: No funds yet
empty.description: Add your first fund to control which designations can be used in campaigns and donations.

deleteDialog.title: Delete fund
deleteDialog.description: Delete {name}? This action cannot be undone.
deleteDialog.descriptionFallback: Delete this fund? This action cannot be undone.

errors.deleteGeneric: Something went wrong while deleting this fund. Please try again.

form.createSubtitle: Add a restricted or unrestricted fund for campaign and donation allocation.
form.editSubtitle: Update this fund for campaign and donation allocation.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Core information used to label and classify the fund.

description.title: Description
description.description: Optional context to explain when this fund should be used.

fields.name: Fund name
fields.nameHint: Use a precise label that fundraising staff will recognize.
fields.typeHint: Restricted funds are for designated giving. Unrestricted funds can support general operations.
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Explain the designation or internal use of this fund.
fields.descriptionHint: This is optional, but helpful when several funds sound similar.

errors.nameTooLong: Fund name must be 255 characters or fewer.
errors.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 5000 characters or fewer.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while saving. Please try again.

tenant.title: Organisation settings
tenant.description: Choose the tenant base currency and default language used for reporting and member emails.
tenant.readOnly: Only organisation admins can update tenant settings.

fields.baseCurrencyHint: This currency is used as the organisation reporting currency.
fields.baseCurrencyHintWithName: {name} will use this currency for converted totals and reports.
fields.defaultLocaleHint: Default language for members who haven't set a personal preference. Members with a personal language keep their choice.

errors.load: Unable to load organisation settings right now.
errors.save: Unable to save organisation settings right now.

snapshot.title: Data export (GDPR / GL)
snapshot.description: Download a JSON snapshot of the organisation data for portability, archival, or general-ledger handoff needs.
snapshot.help: The exported file contains the tenant snapshot returned by the admin API.
snapshot.adminOnly: Export is only available to organisation admins.
snapshot.errorGeneric: Unable to download the export right now.

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal preferences for this workspace.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used for the app and the emails you receive. This is your personal preference — separate from the organisation default.

localeHint.followsTenant: You will follow your organisation's default language. If an admin changes it later, you will follow the new default automatically.
localeHint.personalOverride: Saved as your personal preference. Organisation default changes will not affect you until you switch back.

errors.save: Unable to save your preference right now.

dashboard.subtitle: Here is your organisation's activity today.

stats.totalRaisedHint: Based on the latest recorded donations.
